name: Acumatica
description: Acumatica is a cloud ERP platform with a contract-based REST API for managing financial data, inventory, projects, manufacturing, distribution, and business management workflows.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Acumatica REST API
hasOfferCatalog.description: Contract-based REST API providing programmatic access to financial management, order management, inventory, purchasing, project accounting, CRM, and manufacturing modules. Over 200 default endpoints expose business objects versioned by ERP release.
